title: Outlook profile corruption

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Outlook opens then crashes on startup
servicenow_seed.description: Caller says Outlook closes immediately after opening. Webmail works normally.

correct_steps: Confirm webmail works to isolate to desktop Outlook
Recreate mail profile if safe mode works
rationale: Single-user Outlook crash with webmail working is a client-side Tier 1 issue.

tool_clues.o365: Service health normal. User mailbox accessible through webmail.
